prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-16ISKSRCKIG-16-MTLC Product Type: HOME Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Steel Kitchen Knife Sharpening Rod 12 Inch Description: Every chef knows the importance to having razor sharp blades in their arsenal of cutlery knives. And chances are you have some knives around the kitchen that are in serious need of some expert sharpening. This 12" honing rod is the ideal kitchen knife sharpener to use at home.

The sharpening steel in made from hard Carbon Steel that rates 49 HRC on the Rockwell Scale. This is an extremely solid and well made tool that will work on all kitchen knives.

Keep your blades in good shape so they last longer when you use the 12 Inch Industrial Grade Chefs Steel Knife Sharpening Rod. The sharpening rod is a great value for chefs and home do-it-yourself cooks and makes a great addition to any kitchen. Search Terms: smith culinary tools food prep 16 inch industrial grade chefs kitchen Features: - Length: 12 inch Steel | 4 inch Handle - T13 Carbon Steel - Hardness: 42 HRC - Ergonomic Handle for Comfort - Ring Hook for Hanging === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 12-inch Steel Kitchen Knife Sharpening Rod

openai.item_name: Universal Tool 12 in Steel Kitchen Knife Sharpening Rod

anthropic.title_differentiation: Carbon Steel 49 HRC, Ergonomic Handle, Industrial Grade, Hanging Ring
